Synopsis: Renames New Jersey Merit Rating Plan and provides for changes in procedures for payment of outstanding surcharges.
Renames the Primary Care Physician and Dentist Loan Redemption Program and makes various other changes to the program.
Renames the "police court of the Palisades Interstate park" as "Court of Palisades Interstate Park."
Authorizes transfer of the Atlantic City Convention Center project to the Atlantic City Convention and Visitors Authority and renames that authority.
Revises certain restrictions on permit holders and provisional driver's licensees; renames provisional license "probationary."
Renames Work First New Jersey program as Family Development Program and makes other revisions to program.

Renames "Local Unit Alignment, Reorganization and Consolidation Commission" as "Karcher Commission"; requires commission to promulgate two consecutive plans for municipal consolidation; provides for enactment of municipal consolidation plans.

Renames Dept. of Agriculture as Dept. of Agriculture and Conservation; transfers certain agencies from other depts. to Dept. of Agriculture and Conservation; clarifies authority of Fish and Game Council.
Revises certain restrictions on permit holders and provisional driver's licensees; renames provisional license "probationary." *
Renames the Primary Care Physician and Dentist Loan Redemption Program and makes various other changes to the program.
Authorizes transfer of the Atlantic City Convention Center project to the Atlantic City Convention and Visitors Authority and renames that authority.
Renames the "police court of the Palisades Interstate park" as "Court of Palisades Interstate Park."

Renames Dept. of Agriculture as Dept. of Agriculture and Conservation; transfers certain agencies from other depts. to Dept. of Agriculture and Conservation; clarifies authority of Fish and Game Council.
Renames "New Jersey Trauma Center" at University Hospital as "Eric Munoz Trauma Center."
